messageChannels.title: Message Channels
messageChannels.description: Manage message channels for agent communication
messageChannels.form.name.label: Name
messageChannels.form.description.label: Description
messageChannels.form.type.label: Channel Type
messageChannels.form.status.label: Status
messageChannels.form.feishu.appId.label: App ID
messageChannels.form.feishu.allowFrom.pl: Enter allowed sender ID (e.g., user_id or chat_id)
messageChannels.dialogs.create.title: Create Message Channel
messageChannels.dialogs.create.descripti: Create a new message channel for agent communication
messageChannels.dialogs.edit.title: Edit Message Channel
messageChannels.dialogs.delete.title: Delete Message Channel
messageChannels.dialogs.delete.descripti: Are you sure you want to delete the message channel "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
messageChannels.dialogs.enable.title: Enable Message Channel
messageChannels.dialogs.enable.descripti: Are you sure you want to enable the message channel "{{name}}"?
messageChannels.dialogs.disable.title: Disable Message Channel
messageChannels.dialogs.disable.descript: Are you sure you want to disable the message channel "{{name}}"?
messageChannels.dialogs.bulkDelete.title: Delete Message Channels
messageChannels.dialogs.bulkDelete.descr: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} message channels? This action cannot be undone.
messageChannels.dialogs.bulkDelete.warni: This will permanently delete all selected message channels and remove all agent instance bindings.
messageChannels.dialogs.bindAgent.title: Bind Agent Instance
messageChannels.dialogs.bindAgent.descri: Select an agent instance to bind to the message channel "{{name}}"
messageChannels.dialogs.bindAgent.noInst: No agent instances available. Please create an agent instance first.
messageChannels.dialogs.manageBindings.d: Manage agent instance bindings for message channel "{{name}}"
messageChannels.dialogs.manageBindings.s: Select an agent instance to bind
messageChannels.dialogs.manageBindings.n: No agent instances bound. Add one above.
messageChannels.dialogs.manageBindings.c: Enter chat ID (group ID or leave empty for DM)
Receive messages in group chats without being mentioned
messageChannels.dialogs.bindingRequest.d: Generate a pairing code to bind an agent instance to this channel.
messageChannels.dialogs.bindingRequest.i: Select an agent instance and generate a pairing code. The code can be used on the agent side to complete the binding.
messageChannels.dialogs.bindingRequest.p: Enter this code in the chat where you want to bind the agent. The code will expire in 5 minutes.
messageChannels.messages.pairingSuccess: Pairing successful! Agent instance has been bound.
